targets.goal: Untrusted content cannot forge or close the fence: every occurrence of the sentinel in content is neutralized before wrapping, so wrapped text can never escape the untrusted-data fence.
A password is valid iff length >= 12 AND it contains an upper, a lower, a digit, and a symbol.
A password is valid iff length >= 12 AND it contains an upper, a lower, a digit, and a symbol.
targets.known_gap: the suite only checks length; a mutant that drops the character-class requirement survives — a good test-writer should catch it.

targets.goal: Contains(lo,hi,x) reports whether x is within the inclusive range [lo,hi].
Contains(lo,hi,x) reports whether x is within the inclusive range [lo,hi].
targets.known_gap: the suite never tests the boundaries; a mutant that turns >= into > (excluding lo) or <= into < survives.
